title: Data capture and integration architecture for a quantamental computer system
abstract: A system includes a processing circuit that is configured to establish a wireless connection with an analyst device; detect a trigger event based on detecting a mentioning of a security from the analyst device; in response to detecting the trigger event, receive analyst tracking information from the analyst device relating to the security; generate a data synopsis for the security based on the received analyst tracking information; and provide a graphical user interface to a manager computing device depicting the data synopsis.
claims: 1. A system comprising: a network interface circuit configured to facilitate data transmission over a network; and a processing circuit comprising one or more processors coupled to non-transitory memory, wherein the processing circuit is configured to: establish a wireless connection with an analyst device; receive a permission to access a microphone associated with the analyst device; detect a trigger event based on detecting a verbal mentioning of a security from the analyst device, wherein detecting the verbal mentioning is during a verbal communication held via the analyst device using the microphone and machine learning; in response to detecting the trigger event, receive analyst tracking information from the analyst device relating to the security; generate a data synopsis for the security based on the received analyst tracking information; and provide a graphical user interface to a manager computing device depicting the data synopsis.
